doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: No such EAJP-2025 protocol exists in California State Bar records, and its core provision purporting to waive unauthorized practice restrictions under B&P §6125 without pre-filing attorney review contradicts California law and established S
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: No such "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol (EAJP-2025)" exists in California State Bar records, and the document's core provision—waiving the unauthorized practice prohibition under B&P §6125 for paralegals acting without pre-filing attorney review—is inconsistent with California law and actual State Bar regulatory practice.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 93
REASON: No such EAJP-2025 protocol exists in California State Bar records, and its core provision purporting to waive unauthorized practice restrictions under B&P §6125 without pre-filing attorney review contradicts California law and established State Bar regulatory practice.
